title: Fix broken volume and container tests
body:
There are a handful of tests that aren't actually being run because
there are missing \ which is prevented the tests from being executed.
Additionally some of the test syntax was incorrect but not showing up
because these tests didn't run.

Signed-off-by: Alex Schultz <aschultz@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Can I mention how much I dislike scripting languages?

The volumes thing does seem like a bug, but a minor one.

Changes LGTM
but one of the tests isn't happy, I'm not sure if it's a flake or not.

> test failure seemed unrelated
doing a re-run even though it seems like a flake to see what it spits out.

@mwhahaha we have dropped the ball on reviewing/approving your PR, and I apologize. I will take over review responsibility on this. Unfortunately, I tried to restart a failed test (which I think was a flake), and now the CI system seems completely broken. Would you be willing to rebase & push to see if that clear up CI? I will monitor this going forward, and watch CI, and get back to you in a more timely manner. Thank you for your patience.
yea sure i'll do it today
